'''Lilla Dade''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as a member of the [[Katarn Commandos]] and was considered one of their best trackers. In preparation for the assault on [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], she was sent planetside as the primary infiltrator in [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s base. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], she was assigned to set up an intelligence and resistance unit on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] when the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Yag'Dhul (29 ABY)|attacked]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

[[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]] once commented that she was the best [[Pathfinders/Legends|Pathfinder]] in the entire [[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]]. During the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol]], he carried a [[DL-56 blaster pistol]].
